channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: FA Cup Prize Money: Chelsea and Arsenal Earnings After Reaching Quarterfinals
item.description: Chelsea and Arsenal have successfully made it to the 2025/2026 FA Cup quarterfinals, joining other big teams like Liverpool and Manchester City. Arsenal managed a tough 2-1 win over Mansfield, keeping...

item.title: In-Depth Review: How the Capital One Venture X Rewards Card Offsets Its Annual Fee for Frequent Travelers
item.description: The Capital One Venture X Rewards Credit Card is CNN Underscored’s top pick among premium travel rewards cards. Designed for frequent travelers, it offers strong earning potential, valuable credits, a...

item.title: Mbarali Council Disburses Sh1.7 Billion Loans to Support Women Entrepreneurs

item.title: Journalists Called to Strengthen Ethical Reporting and Fact-Checking Amid AI and Citizen Journalism Challenges
item.description: For this symposium wey Open African Tribune organise for Lekki, Lagos on Thursday, March 6, 2026 or so, journalists don dey called to step up their game against misinformation and disinformation as AI...

item.title: Seventh US service member dies from injuries sustained in Iranian attack on troops in Saudi Arabia
item.description: The US military has reported that a seventh service member has been killed in action during Operation Epic Fury, the ongoing conflict with Iran. The individual died on Saturday night from injuries rec...

item.title: Simba and Yanga Share Points in Historic Zanzibar Derby
item.description: Dar es Salaam – The Kariakoo Derby took a very unusual turn last Sunday at the New Amaan Stadium Complex in Zanzibar. Even before the game began, the Tanzania Football Federation (TFF) issued strict w...

item.title: How Tinkering, Teamwork, Trade, and Infrastructure Drive Innovation

item.title: Parliament set to debate motion for removal of Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla

item.title: UK Surgeon Performs Long-Distance Robotic Prostate Surgery
item.description: In a groundbreaking medical development, a surgeon in London successfully performed the UK's first long-distance robotic surgery on a patient located 1,500 miles away in Gibraltar. Professor Prokar Da...

item.title: Calgary Startup Advances Exploration of Natural Hydrogen Resources in Canada
item.description: Kavenex Energy, a Calgary-based startup, has secured significant private investment to explore geological hydrogen, a carbon-free energy resource with potential economic and environmental benefits for...

item.title: DOH Reports Significant Decline in Rabies Cases in Early 2026
item.description: The Department of Health (DOH) reported a notable decrease in rabies cases in the Philippines, recording 17 cases from January 4 to February 21, 2026, compared to 49 cases during the same period last ...

item.title: Enugu Governor’s Wife Champions Women’s Rights and Health on International Women’s Day

item.title: Later school start times could better support teenagers’ sleep and learning
item.description: Schools in Australia largely follow schedules established in the 19th century, often running from around 9am to 3pm, or earlier in some cases. These hours were originally designed to fit daylight hour...

item.title: President Marcos to Promote Peace and Philippines’ UN Security Council Bid in New York
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. arrived in New York City on March 8, 2026, for a two-day working visit to the United States. During this visit, he will advocate for a peaceful resolution of the escalat...

item.title: South Africa moves to regulate and expand cannabis and hemp industry
item.description: South Africa is undertaking major regulatory reforms to develop a formal cannabis and hemp industry, targeting economic growth, job creation, and rural development. The government, through the departm...

item.title: Nicola Coughlan urges a focus beyond body image in public discourse
item.description: Nicola Coughlan, best known for her role in Bridgerton, has voiced her frustration with the persistent focus on body image, describing encounters where her work was overshadowed by discussions about h...

item.title: DepEd implements first unified science high school admission test in Metro Manila
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) has conducted the first-ever Unified Science High School Admission Test (USHAT) in Metro Manila, aiming to improve the admission system for incoming Grade 7 student...

item.title: J&K Police Attach Property of Proclaimed Terror Offender in Rajouri
item.description: In a recent development in Rajouri district, Jammu & Kashmir, local police have attached immovable property belonging to Shafeeq Ahmed, who has been declared a proclaimed offender in a terror-related ...

item.title: Hamilton youth rescued after falling through ice near Pier 7
item.description: On March 7, 2026, two youths fell through ice near the Pier 7 boardwalk in Hamilton, Ontario. Despite warnings from bystanders, they ventured onto unsafe ice near Williams Fresh Cafe. When the ice gav...

item.title: Democrats Target Latino Voters in Key Primary Races Across Swing Districts
item.description: Democrats are increasingly focusing on Latino voters following record turnout in recent primaries, particularly highlighted by James Talarico's strong performance in Texas. This surge has prompted cam...
